app.title: beeromat
app.tagline: After the match. After the pint. Without the chaos.

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.checkInbox: If your email is invited, a sign-in link is on its way.

magicLink.invalidTitle: This link can no longer be used
magicLink.invalidBody: The link has expired or has already been used. Ask your club admin for a new invitation.

setup.title: Set a PIN for this device
setup.subtitle: A short 4-digit PIN unlocks beeromat quickly on this device.

unlock.title: Enter your PIN
unlock.lockedBody: Five wrong attempts. Sign in again with the link from your email.

errors.unauthorized: You need to sign in to do that.
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission for that.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment.
